title: corallodendron umbrosum
intro: Corallodendron umbrosum, also known as the umbrella tree or umbrella coral tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Corallodendron umbrosum include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Corallodendron umbrosum typically involve drying and crushing the leaves or bark to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
